schema.name: InfobloxInsight_CL
schema.description: The InfobloxInsight table contains security insights from Infoblox BloxOne Threat Defense that have been ingested into Microsoft Sentinel. This provides threat intelligence, SOC insights, and DNS security event analysis.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (in UTC) when the insight was first detected.

columns.name: DateChanged
columns.description: Timestamp when the insight was last modified

columns.name: EventsNotBlockedCount
columns.description: Number of events that were not blocked (string from API)

columns.name: FeedSource
columns.description: Source of the threat intelligence feed

columns.name: MostRecentAt
columns.description: Timestamp of the most recent event related to this insight

columns.name: NumEvents
columns.description: Total number of events associated with this insight (string from API)

columns.name: PriorityText
columns.description: Priority level in text format (e.g., CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW)

columns.name: StartedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the insight was first detected

columns.name: Status
columns.description: Current status of the insight (e.g., Active, Closed, Dismissed)

columns.name: ThreatType
columns.description: Type of threat detected (e.g., Malware, DNS Tunneling, C2, DGA)

columns.name: EventsBlockedCount
columns.description: Number of events that were blocked (string from API)

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connector friendly name assigned during connector setup

columns.name: TenantHost
columns.description: Infoblox API host extracted from the configured API URL
